	<span>
		📖 Abstract
	</span>
</h2>
<p>We propose <strong>OmniWeaving</strong>, an omni-level video generation model featuring powerful multimodal composition and reasoning-informed capabilities. By leveraging a massive-scale pretraining dataset that encompasses diverse compositional and reasoning-augmented scenarios, OmniWeaving learns to temporally bind interleaved text, multi-image, and video inputs while acting as an intelligent agent to infer complex user intentions for sophisticated video creation. 
Furthermore, we introduce <strong>IntelligentVBench</strong>, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously assess next-level intelligent unified video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniWeaving achieves SoTA performance among open-source unified models.</p>
<p><a id="model-architecture" rel="nofollow"></a></p>
<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="🏗-model-architecture" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#🏗-model-architecture" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		🏗 Model Architecture
	</span>
</h2>
<p>Following the paper, <strong>OmniWeaving</strong> is built as an integrated <strong>MLLM + MMDiT + VAE</strong> framework for unified free-form video generation. The <strong>MLLM</strong> serves as the semantic parser for interleaved text, images, and video inputs, mapping them into a high-level semantic space and forwarding its hidden states through an MLP connector. The <strong>VAE</strong> acts as the visual tokenizer, compressing visual inputs into low-level latents, while the <strong>MMDiT</strong> uses these semantic conditions together with latent noise to generate semantically aligned, high-fidelity videos.</p>
<p>On this basis, we further introduce two extra improvements tailored for advanced reasoning and composition.</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>(1) Activating Thinking Mode of the MLLM:</strong> Direct MLLM encoding of interleaved visual-text inputs often yields semantic ambiguity due to weak intra-correlations and unclear video creation intents. We elevate the MLLM from a passive feature extractor to an active reasoner. By activating the thinking mode to generate intermediate reasoning steps, it autonomously deduces a semantically precise, enhanced prompt. The hidden states of this enhanced prompt are then forwarded alongside the original MLLM features to condition the MMDiT, effectively bridging the cognitive gap between abstract user intent and pixel-level generation.</li>
<li><strong>(2) Hidden States DeepStacking:</strong> Compositional video generation involving multiple subjects or intricate scenes often relies on both low- and high-level semantic representations. Drawing inspiration from the DeepStacking mechanism in Qwen3-VL, we extract hidden states from a broader range of intermediate MLLM layers to capture a rich semantic spectrum spanning from fine-grained details to high-level abstractions. An MLP connector projects these multi-level features into the MMDiT embedding space. These projected features are then directly added to the corresponding hidden states within the first three layers of the MMDiT conditioning branch, effectively injecting multi-granular semantic guidance into the generative process.</li>
</ul>

	<span>
		Step 2: Install Dependencies
	</span>
</h3>
<p>OmniWeaving is built upon <a href="https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HunyuanVideo-1.5" rel="nofollow">HunyuanVideo-1.5</a>. The way to install dependencies is similar to HunyuanVideo-1.5. Specifically, you should install basic dependencies:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">pip install -r requirements.txt
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p>Additionally, install the attention libraries as needed (we use Flash Attention in practice):</p>
<ul>
<li><p><strong>Flash Attention</strong>: Install for faster inference and reduced GPU memory consumption. See <a href="https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention" rel="nofollow">Flash Attention</a> for details.</p>
</li>
<li><p><strong>Flex-Block-Attention</strong>: Required only for sparse attention to achieve faster inference:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">git <span class="hljs-built_in">clone</span> https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/flex-block-attn.git
<span class="hljs-built_in">cd</span> flex-block-attn
git submodule update --init --recursive
python3 setup.py install
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</li>
<li><p><strong>SageAttention</strong>: For faster inference (will automatically disable Flex-Block-Attention):</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">git <span class="hljs-built_in">clone</span> https://github.com/cooper1637/SageAttention.git
<span class="hljs-built_in">cd</span> SageAttention 
<span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> EXT_PARALLEL=4 NVCC_APPEND_FLAGS=<span class="hljs-string">"--threads 8"</span> MAX_JOBS=32 <span class="hljs-comment"># Optional</span>
python3 setup.py install
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="🔑-inference" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#🔑-inference" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		🔑 Inference
	</span>
</h2>
<p>In our inference code, we define <strong>six task flags</strong> corresponding to the <a href="#supported-tasks" rel="nofollow">Supported Tasks</a>. Their mapping is as follows:</p>
<div class="max-w-full overflow-auto">
	<table>
		<thead><tr>
<th>Task Flag</th>
<th>Full Name</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

		</thead><tbody><tr>
<td><code>t2v</code></td>
<td>Text-to-Video</td>
<td>Generate videos from text prompts.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>i2v</code></td>
<td>First-Frame-to-Video</td>
<td>Animate a static image into a video guided by text.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>interpolation</code></td>
<td>Key-Frames-to-Video</td>
<td>Generate a video conditioned on start and end frames.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>reference2v</code></td>
<td>Reference-to-Video / Compositional Multi-Image-to-Video</td>
<td>Single- or multi-subject reference-driven video generation.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>editing</code></td>
<td>Video-to-Video Editing</td>
<td>Instruction-based video manipulation and stylization.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>tiv2v</code></td>
<td>Text-Image-Video-to-Video</td>
<td>Generate a video conditioned on  text, image, and video inputs.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
	</table>
</div>
<p>Among these, <strong><code>t2v</code>, <code>i2v</code>, and <code>interpolation</code></strong> can optionally enable <strong>thinking mode</strong> (<code>--think</code>) for <strong>Reasoning-Augmented Video Generation</strong>, where the MLLM first reasons over user intent before generating the video.</p>
<h3 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="common-configuration" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#common-configuration" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>
	</a>
	<span>
		Common Configuration
	</span>
</h3>
<p>All tasks share the following hyperparameters (configured at the top of <code>generate.sh</code>):</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">N_INFERENCE_GPU=8
SEED=0
ASPECT_RATIO=16:9
MODEL_PATH=/path/to/OmniWeaving
SAGE_ATTN=<span class="hljs-literal">false</span> <span class="hljs-comment">### Use Flash Attention</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">### SAGE_ATTN=true ### Use SageAttention</span>
SPARSE_ATTN=<span class="hljs-literal">false</span>
OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=<span class="hljs-literal">false</span>
ENABLE_CACHE=<span class="hljs-literal">false</span>
CACHE_TYPE=deepcache
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Tips:</strong> If your GPU memory is limited and you encounter OOM errors, try:</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash"><span class="hljs-built_in">export</span> PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True,max_split_size_mb:128
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<p>If you have limited CPU memory, disable overlapped group offloading by setting <code>OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING=false</code>.</p>
</blockquote>

<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="1-text-to-video-t2v" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#1-text-to-video-t2v" rel="nofollow">
		<span class="header-link"><svg class="text-gray-500 hover:text-black dark:hover:text-gray-200 w-4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="1em" height="1em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><path d="M167.594 88.393a8.001 8.001 0 0 1 0 11.314l-67.882 67.882a8 8 0 1 1-11.314-11.315l67.882-67.881a8.003 8.003 0 0 1 11.314 0zm-28.287 84.86l-28.284 28.284a40 40 0 0 1-56.567-56.567l28.284-28.284a8 8 0 0 0-11.315-11.315l-28.284 28.284a56 56 0 0 0 79.196 79.197l28.285-28.285a8 8 0 1 0-11.315-11.314zM212.852 43.14a56.002 56.002 0 0 0-79.196 0l-28.284 28.284a8 8 0 1 0 11.314 11.314l28.284-28.284a40 40 0 0 1 56.568 56.567l-28.285 28.285a8 8 0 0 0 11.315 11.314l28.284-28.284a56.065 56.065 0 0 0 0-79.196z" fill="currentColor"></path></svg></span>

	<span>
		1. Text-to-Video (<code>t2v</code>)
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Generate a video from a text prompt.</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">"Put Your Prompt Here"</span>
NEGATIVE_PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">"overexposed, low quality, deformation, a poor composition, bad hands, bad teeth, bad eyes, bad limbs, distortion"</span>
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/t2v.mp4
torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --task t2v \
  --prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --negative_prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$NEGATIVE_PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="hljs-variable">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="hljs-variable">$SEED</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="hljs-variable">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="hljs-variable">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="hljs-variable">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-variable">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --output_path <span class="hljs-variable">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="hljs-variable">$MODEL_PATH</span> \
  <span class="hljs-comment"># --think \          # Optional: enable reasoning-augmented generation (see note below)</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The <code>--think</code> flag activates the MLLM's thinking mode, in which it reasons over user intent and generates an enriched prompt before video generation. The <code>--think</code> flag is supported by <code>t2v</code>, <code>i2v</code>, and <code>interpolation</code> tasks.</p>
</blockquote>

<h4 class="relative group flex items-baseline">
	<a id="3-key-frames-to-video-interpolation" class="block pr-1.5 text-lg md:absolute md:p-1.5 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 md:right-full" href="#3-key-frames-to-video-interpolation" rel="nofollow">

	<span>
		3. Key-Frames-to-Video (<code>interpolation</code>)
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Generate a video that bridges two key frames, guided by a text prompt.</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">"Put Your Prompt Here"</span>
REF_IMAGE_PATHS=(/path/to/first_frame.png /path/to/last_frame.png)
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/interpolation.mp4

torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --task interpolation \
  --prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --ref_image_paths <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">${REF_IMAGE_PATHS[@]}</span>"</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="hljs-variable">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="hljs-variable">$SEED</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="hljs-variable">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="hljs-variable">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="hljs-variable">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-variable">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --output_path <span class="hljs-variable">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="hljs-variable">$MODEL_PATH</span> \
  <span class="hljs-comment"># --think \          # Optional: enable reasoning-augmented generation</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>

	<span>
		4. Reference-to-Video / Compositional Multi-Image-to-Video (<code>reference2v</code>)
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Generate a video featuring one or more reference subjects. Provide one or more reference images via <code>--ref_image_paths</code>.</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">"Put Your Prompt Here"</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># Supports 1–4 reference images.</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># For best results with multiple images, use the same aspect ratio across all images,</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># as they will be center-cropped to match the size of the first image.</span>
REF_IMAGE_PATHS=(/path/to/img1.png /path/to/img2.png ... /path/to/img4.png)  <span class="hljs-comment"># up to 4 input images</span>
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/reference2v.mp4
torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --task reference2v \
  --prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --ref_image_paths <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">${REF_IMAGE_PATHS[@]}</span>"</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="hljs-variable">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="hljs-variable">$SEED</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="hljs-variable">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="hljs-variable">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="hljs-variable">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-variable">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --output_path <span class="hljs-variable">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="hljs-variable">$MODEL_PATH</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>

	<span>
		6. Text-Image-Video-to-Video (<code>tiv2v</code>)
	</span>
</h4>
<p>Edit a video while incorporating reference subject images (e.g., insert a character from a reference image into a source video).</p>
<div class="relative group repo-copy-code"><pre><code class="language-bash">PROMPT=<span class="hljs-string">"Put Your Prompt Here"</span>
CONDITION_VIDEO_PATH=/path/to/source_video.mp4
<span class="hljs-comment"># Only one reference image is supported for tiv2v.</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># For best results, use a reference image whose aspect ratio is close to the output video's aspect ratio.</span>
REF_IMAGE_PATHS=(/path/to/ref_image.png)
OUTPUT_PATH=./outputs/tiv2v.mp4

<span class="hljs-comment"># If you have pre-extracted VAE latents for the condition video, pass them via</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># --condition_video_latents_path /path/to/latents.pt to skip VAE encoding at inference.</span>
torchrun --nproc_per_node=<span class="hljs-variable">$N_INFERENCE_GPU</span> generate.py \
  --task tiv2v \
  --prompt <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">$PROMPT</span>"</span> \
  --condition_video_paths <span class="hljs-variable">$CONDITION_VIDEO_PATH</span> \
  --ref_image_paths <span class="hljs-string">"<span class="hljs-variable">${REF_IMAGE_PATHS[@]}</span>"</span> \
  --aspect_ratio <span class="hljs-variable">$ASPECT_RATIO</span> \
  --seed <span class="hljs-variable">$SEED</span> \
  --sparse_attn <span class="hljs-variable">$SPARSE_ATTN</span> --use_sageattn <span class="hljs-variable">$SAGE_ATTN</span> \
  --enable_cache <span class="hljs-variable">$ENABLE_CACHE</span> --cache_type <span class="hljs-variable">$CACHE_TYPE</span> \
  --overlap_group_offloading <span class="hljs-variable">$OVERLAP_GROUP_OFFLOADING</span> \
  --output_path <span class="hljs-variable">$OUTPUT_PATH</span> \
  --model_path <span class="hljs-variable">$MODEL_PATH</span> \
  <span class="hljs-comment"># --condition_video_latents_path /path/to/latents.pt  # Optional: skip VAE encoding by providing pre-extracted latents</span>
</code></pre><button class="absolute top-3 right-3 transition opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-80"><svg class="" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" role="img" width="0.9em" height="0.9em" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><path d="M28,10V28H10V10H28m0-2H10a2,2,0,0,0-2,2V28a2,2,0,0,0,2,2H28a2,2,0,0,0,2-2V10a2,2,0,0,0-2-2Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><path d="M4,18H2V4A2,2,0,0,1,4,2H18V4H4Z" transform="translate(0)"></path><rect fill="none" width="32" height="32"></rect></svg></button></div>

	<span>
		Other Optional Arguments
	</span>
</h3>
<p>The arguments below can be appended to any of the task commands above for further customization:</p>
<div class="max-w-full overflow-auto">
	<table>
		<thead><tr>
<th>Argument</th>
<th>Type</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>

		</thead><tbody><tr>
<td><code>--negative_prompt</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td><code>""</code></td>
<td>Negative prompt for video generation. Default is empty. Setting a negative prompt (e.g., <code>'overexposed, low quality, deformation, a poor composition, bad hands, bad teeth, bad eyes, bad limbs, distortion'</code>) can improve quality, especially for tasks like <code>t2v</code>.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--num_inference_steps</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td><code>50</code></td>
<td>Number of denoising steps</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--video_length</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td><code>81</code></td>
<td>Number of frames to generate</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--fps</code></td>
<td>int</td>
<td>Auto</td>
<td>Output FPS (default: 16 for ≤81 frames, 24 for >81 frames)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--dtype</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td><code>bf16</code></td>
<td>Data type: <code>bf16</code> or <code>fp32</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--offloading</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Enable CPU offloading</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--group_offloading</code></td>
<td>bool</td>
<td><code>None</code></td>
<td>Enable group offloading (auto-enabled with offloading)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>--pipeline_config</code></td>
<td>str</td>
<td><code>omniweaving</code></td>
<td>Pipeline configuration preset that controls <code>guidance_scale</code> and <code>flow_shift</code>. Available presets: <code>omniweaving</code> (<code>guidance_scale=6.0, flow_shift=7.0</code>), <code>omniweaving2</code> (<code>guidance_scale=6.0, flow_shift=5.0</code>).</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
	</table>
</div>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Tuning <code>guidance_scale</code> / <code>flow_shift</code>:</strong> You can switch presets via <code>--pipeline_config</code> (e.g., <code>--pipeline_config omniweaving2</code>). If the available presets do not meet your needs, you can add a new key to the <a href="https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/OmniWeaving/blob/main/hyvideo/commons/__init__.py#L48-L59" rel="nofollow"><code>PIPELINE_CONFIGS</code> dict in <code>hyvideo/commons/__init__.py</code></a> with your desired values. We recommend <code>guidance_scale=6.0</code> with <code>flow_shift=5.0</code> or <code>7.0</code>.
<a id="citation" rel="nofollow"></a></p>
</blockquote>
